notes: New dashboard (Pano): a data-rich operations panel with charts instead of a camera list. Recording-volume trend (1 week / 1 month / 6 months), top-10 cameras by disk usage and by recorded time, disk-fill forecast (how many days until the disk is full), daily alarm chart with a by-type breakdown, and per-camera recording coverage to spot cameras with gaps. Plus the earlier RBAC fixes and per-camera recording-quality (ONVIF encoder) controls.
